title: Maintenance person
salary_range: 14€/h and supplements according to TES, mileage allowances for using your own car
meta_description: Join Inka-Maaret Oy, Kittilä as a Maintenance person and grow your career in Kittilä. Check details and apply now.
description: Inka-Maaret Oy is seeking a maintenance person to join our team for property maintenance tasks in Kittilä from 1.11.2026. The ideal candidate should have experience in physical and scheduled work, as well as a B driver's license and own car. However, the most important qualities are a positive attitude, good common sense, initiative, and excellent communication skills. Work collars must be kept in hand, work is done independently, and the job includes on-call shifts. The focus is on the end of the week, allowing for leisure activities like hiking or enjoying the falls' millions of leisure activities on weekdays. We will help you find an apartment. Contact us by email, not by phone calls.
what_we_expect: Experience in physical and scheduled work
B driver's license and own car
job_responsibilities: B driver's license and own car
what_we_offer: End of the week focus on leisure activities or hiking
search_keywords: maintenance person, property maintenance, winter, Sirkka, Levi, experience, B driver's license, own car, work attitude, common sense, initiative, good communication skills, work collars, do work independently, on-call shifts, end of the week focus, leisure activities, hiking, apartment

title: A cleaner
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Build your future with Inka-Maaret Oy, Kittilä as a A cleaner in Kittilä. Learn more about the role and apply now.
description: Inka-Maaret Oy is seeking a full-time cleaner to join our team in Kittilä, where we offer winter cleaning services for villa and holiday apartments. The role involves cleaning up, snow removal, deliveries of firewood, procurement of supplies, and working independently or with a partner. Experience in physical and scheduled work is an advantage, but not necessary, as is a B driver's license. However, work attitude, the ability to use common sense, initiative, and good communication skills are more important. The work is done with a partner and independently, and situations often change very unpredictably. You must be able to speak English because the area is full of international tourists.
what_we_expect: Experience in physical and scheduled work
what_we_offer: Focus on the end of the week
search_keywords: cleaning, villa, holiday, apartment, snow removal, deliveries, firewood, procurement, supplies, flexible, communication, common sense, work attitude, English, international tourists, fell's millions of leisure activities, hiking

title: Home and cleaning service worker
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Exciting Home and cleaning service worker position available at AmandaK Ky, Hirvensalmi in Mikkeli. Check requirements and submit your application today.
description: AmandaK Ky, Hirvensalmi is seeking a Home and cleaning service worker to join our team. We are looking for someone who can clean glass surfaces, maintain cleaning equipment, stocks of cleaning supplies, clean up, clean surfaces, use a pressure washer, clean the toilets, clean specific areas manually, take care of routine waste, vacuum surfaces, sort waste, take care of personal hygiene requirements when cleaning. The work is physical and the working time is largely spent on one's feet. We take carpets outside to be tamped, move things in front of the windows if necessary and carry the tools with us. A good basic condition is therefore a bonus and makes your work easier. The work is seasonal. I answer the phone best during office hours, e-mails in the evening.
what_we_expect: Good basic condition is therefore a bonus and makes your work easier
Home and cleaning service worker The work is mainly cleaning and housekeeping tasks in customers' homes.
There are a few companies on the job list and they are generally handled in the morning before 9 a.m.
job_responsibilities: Cleaning and housekeeping tasks in customers' homes
Listen to and implement the customers' wishes regarding cleaning or other tasks
Wash toilets in the morning, windows during the day, mow the lawn in the afternoon or have a coffee with a customer and have a nice chat
Laundry maintenance at the company's premises
Wash and hang laundry, help the customer take a shower, or even find out phone numbers and book a hairdresser
what_we_offer: Physical and the working time is largely spent on one's feet
Home and cleaning service worker The work is mainly cleaning and housekeeping tasks in customers' homes.
search_keywords: cleaning, housekeeping, customer service, physical, seasonal

title: Chef
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Take the next step in your career as a Chef at Sauhu Gourmet Oy, Järvenpää, located in Järvenpää. Apply now and get started.
description: We are looking for a part-time Chef at Sauhu Gourmet Oy, Järvenpää. The ideal candidate should have experience in the field and be passionate about coarse food. They must be able to work independently and in a team, with excellent problem-solving skills and quick under pressure. They must also have good communication skills and be able to handle chemical cleaners. We offer a challenging and versatile set of tasks, as well as opportunities for development and learning from experienced colleagues. If you are interested in this role, please send your application with salary request, CV with attachments to rekrytointi@sauhu.bar.
what_we_expect: Ability to work in a team and independently
job_responsibilities: Keep the tools in hand and the package together even under pressure
Work in a fast-paced atmosphere without forgetting humor
Meet customers also in the hall side in customer service tasks
what_we_offer: A challenging and versatile set of tasks
Nice top professionals as colleagues from whom you learn and learn new things
An opportunity to develop your skills
search_keywords: chef job responsibilities requirements benefits expectations offer search keywords

title: Restaurant manager, Sauhu Gourmet Oy, Sauhu - Bistro&Bar, Järvenpää

description: We are looking for a Restaurant Manager at Sauhu Gourmet Oy in Järvenpää. The role involves managing a restaurant, ensuring compliance with health and safety regulations, training employees, performing food cooling processes, managing expenses, planning menus, working in a group in the tourism, accommodation or catering sector, presenting the food representatively, ordering supplies, maintaining a clean, hygienic and safe working environment, knowing the nutritional value of food.
what_we_expect: Passion for a dazzling customer experience
Problem-solving skills, quickness, under pressure, precision
Language skills (Finnish, other languages are considered an advantage)
IT skills (basic IT skills are also considered an advantage)

Manage fast-paced and relaxed work environment
